summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. A graphic shows a booking-style photo of a young man with the text CHARGES: MURDER and a name, credited to the Harris County Sheriff. The segment also shows surveillance footage of a storefront with a dark SUV parked outside, captioned FORT MYERS, FL, APRIL 2. The lower-third reads ILLEGAL ALIEN ACCUSED OF TX SLEDGEHAMMER MURDER and later DHS TO TEXAS COUNTY: DO NOT RELEASE MURDER SUSPECT.

script.scene: A graphic shows a booking photo with CHARGES: MURDER; lower-third reads ILLEGAL ALIEN ACCUSED OF TX SLEDGEHAMMER MURDER.
Surveillance footage of a storefront with a dark SUV; caption reads FORT MYERS, FL, APRIL 2.
Lower-third changes to DHS TO TEXAS COUNTY: DO NOT RELEASE MURDER SUSPECT.

notable_text: CHARGES: MURDER; Harris County Sheriff; ILLEGAL ALIEN ACCUSED OF TX SLEDGEHAMMER MURDER; DHS TO TEXAS COUNTY: DO NOT RELEASE MURDER SUSPECT; FORT MYERS, FL
